steps.title: Set the possessive subject
steps.content: The blank is the subject of the verb "correlate." Because the sentence is discussing Canada and Germany's constitutions, the subject must be plural. It also needs a possessive form because the lengths belong to the constitutions.

steps.title: Reject number and ownership errors
steps.content: A has the plural possessive but the singular noun "length." B lacks the possessive apostrophe. C is singular possessive and singular, even though two constitutions are being discussed. The plural possessive with plural "lengths" fits the sentence and agrees with "correlate." The answer is D.
